ab: ci Kacaw ko ngangan no mako.
ci Asing ko ngangan no wama ako.
ci Panay ko ngangan no wina ako.
mo^tepay to ko mihecaan no mako anini.
cecayay ko kaka ako, ci Kulas ko ngangan ningra, cecayay to ko safaw ko mihecaan ningra.
ch: 我有一個哥哥，他叫kulas，他今年11歲。
en: I have a brother, his name is kulas, he is 11 years old.

ab: malacecayay ko pitilidan niyam a mitilid.
ch: 我們在同一間學校讀書。
en: We study in the same school.

ab: maolah kako aci kaka a romadiw.
en: Both my brother and I like to sing.

ab: maolah kako a midangoy, paaliwacan i, malahakelong ko paro no loma’ niyam a midangoy.
ch: 我喜歡游泳，放假的時候，我們全家會一起去游泳。
en: I like swimming. During the holidays, our whole family go swimming together.

ab: maolah kako a misawidang to fa^lohay a widang, manga’ay kami a malacafay romadiw ato midangoy.
ch: 我喜歡認識新朋友，我們可以一起唱歌和游泳。
en: I love meeting new people, we can sing and swim together.
